en: This is the story of the day my life ended.
I'm kidding. It was the happiest day of my life. Our wedding day.
The biggest shindig to hit the kingdom in forever.
Everyone dying to catch a glimpse of me. Us. I meant us.
Everything was perfect. Just like I always dreamed it would be.
Yeah. Everything was perfect. Oh, come on!
They still can't get my nose right. It was a magical day.
And everything went just as we planned.
Well... Almost.
Wow. Wow.
Wow. Wow. Wow.
Dearly beloved, we are gathered here today to celebrate the joining of Rapunzel's and
Eugene's in marriage.
To live their lives together as husband and wife in everlasting peace.
May I have the rings?
Those were my grandmother's wedding rings!
The kingdom is lost!
And the mutual respect which they bring to their life together
had their roots in the love and friendship and guidance you have given them.
Look at this!
Ah!
Held in reverence. Dignity, honor, respect.
Frying pans! Commandant of frying pans here! Fire!
Fire! That's the signal!
Release the doves! There's the doves. Release the lanterns!
Release the lanterns!
Fire!
Fire! In everlasting peace, may I have the rings?
I... I now pronounce you husband and wife.
You may kiss.
Happy birthday!
So, who wants a piece of cake?
Happy birthday!
